description: Composition: 100% CottonCare: Machine Wash separately in cold water, use mild detergent. Do not Bleach. Avoid Soaking. Remove promptly. Line Dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only. Do Not Iron Directly on Print/embroidery.Fitting: Slim FitA sunny yellow polo t-shirt that looks great on its own or under a sweater.. Not too slim, not too loose, this t-shirt's fit is just perfect. This T-shirt suits formal wear trousers and leisurewear denim jeans, khaki or cargo effortlessly. Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
